Proxy._apiBaseUriComment: MUST include the `/api/` prefix — the proxy extracts everything after `/api/proxy/` as the downstream path. For `/api/proxy/v1/whoami` the extracted path is `v1/whoami`; combined with this base URI the final URL becomes `http://localhost:5044/api/v1/whoami`, matching the Api's route.

Spa._comment: Dev-time reverse proxy to Angular dev server. UseDevProxy=true makes :5001 the single browser-visible origin. Users can still hit :4200 directly for pure-UI work with HMR; :5001 is the auth-integrated entry point.

_azureAdComment: BFF confidential-client OIDC — flip Enabled to true AFTER completing Phase-9 A1 (Azure portal BFF App Registration). ClientSecret MUST come from user-secrets (`dotnet user-secrets set "AzureAd:ClientSecret" <value>` inside src/UI/Enterprise.Platform.Web.UI), NEVER this file. TenantId + ClientId below are placeholders — replace with the BFF registration values from the portal. See Docs/Security/bff-oidc-setup.md for the full runbook.
